rulings.Case Title: VIOLET FONG HOM VS. CYNTHIA JONE FONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Confirming Sale; Referee'S Report Of Sale

rulings.Case Title: SHERENE RANDLE VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. ALSO KNOWN AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment Of Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 14, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment Of Dismissal DENIED. "When a demurrer to any pleading is sustained or overruled, and time to amend or answer is given, the time so given runs from the service of notice of the decision or order." CCP 472b. Defendant, prevailing party on Demurrer, failed to comply with CRC 3.1312, i.e. no proposed order was provided for approval as to form to Plaintiff, no proposed order was provided to the Court for execution, therefore, no notice of entry of order was given to Plaintiff and the time to file an amended complaint has not started running. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE M SCONBERG VS. JASON WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 14, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF ANNE SCONBERG's Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Continued to November 22, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than November 14, 2013 by 4 pm with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GUADALUPE MARTIN VS. JOSE G VIDAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 14, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT JOSE VIDAL's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Defendant fails to sustain his burden under CCP 473(b). No evidence is provided showing mistake, surprise or excusable neglect re: failure to timely respond to Summons and Complaint. = (501/REQ)
